title: MENA investment banking fees plunge 19% to three-year low in H1 2026
summary: JP Morgan is the top earner in banking fees, according to LSEG data
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE generated more than half of the total investment banking fees, or 55%, over the period, followed by Saudi Arabia at 25%, followed by Qatar at 7%. Image courtesy: Getty Images/Weiquan Lin

JP Morgan is the top earner in banking fees, according to LSEG data

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

MENA investment banking fees plunged 19% to an estimated $757.1 million in the first half of 2026, marking a three-year low and extending the decline recorded in Q1, as the region grappled with the economic setbacks of the US-Iran conflict.
